/usr/bin/cc -fsanitize=address,undefined -g -fsanitize=address,undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/local_vfs_test.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/local_vfs_test.dir/test_main.c.o "CMakeFiles/local_vfs_test.dir/home/hb/lkvo/projects/9P-Walkers/pwos-slave/User/backend/local_vfs.c.o" "CMakeFiles/local_vfs_test.dir/home/hb/lkvo/projects/9P-Walkers/pwos-shared/mini9p/mini9p_protocol.c.o" -o local_vfs_test
